summary: Completed comprehensive testing of coin modal countdown timer sync with relay functionality. Verified all core features are working correctly with the implemented fix.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal does not close when clicking outside the modal content area
Countdown timer starts at 59s instead of exactly 60s (minor timing issue)

passed_tests: Coin modal opens when clicking 'Insert Coins' button
Countdown timer starts at approximately 60 seconds
'/api/coin/start' endpoint called when opening coin modal
'/api/coin/done' endpoint called when clicking 'I'm Done' button
Coin modal closes when clicking 'I'm Done' button
Countdown timer displays properly and decreases over time
Countdown progress bar updates correctly with timer
Socket.io coin_pulse event handler contains countdown reset fix (startCoinCountdown(60, 60))
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal close behavior when clicking outside modal content area. The countdown timer sync fix is correctly implemented in the coin_pulse event handler.
